problem: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure?
hypothesis: If Quantum tunneling through energy barrier is applied to what, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
